Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows

The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.

Why it matters

The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.
